title: Analytics - Software Language Change
scenario: Verify that a DFU-triggered Software Language Change event displays all required parameters on Firebase and increments event counts after a few hours.
steps: 1. Trigger a Device Firmware Update (DFU) that includes a language change on a device.
2. Open the Firebase console and navigate to the Software Language Change event page.
3. Verify that the default elements are displayed: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.

4. Verify that the following additional parameters are present: Success, Device Name, Firmware Update Status, Current/Target Headset Version, Current/Target Charge Case Version, Current/Target Charge Stand Version, Current/Target Language ID, Target Language Name, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Progress, Headset/Charge Case/Charge Stand Update Time in Seconds, Error Description.
5. Wait a few hours after triggering the language change.
6. Check the event counts for the related elements and confirm they have increased.
expected: The Software Language Change event is triggered by a DFU with a language change. The Firebase page displays all default elements and additional parameters. After a few hours, event counts for related elements increase.
